subcodes.first_line: O guest of God! Where is the Host and where is His companion? Know thou that He is in the hands of enemies who plot [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا ضیف الله این المضیف و این صاحبه ان اعلمی بانه فی ایدی الاعدآء و یمکرون
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @consolation and comfort, @thankfulness; gratitude
